category.scope_note: Data-center liquid cooling equipment comparison for cold-plate loops, coolant distribution units, and related thermal-management assemblies.

title.en: China-to-EU Data-center Liquid Cooling Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国数据中心液冷设备进入欧盟：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國數據中心液冷設備進入歐盟：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China data-center liquid cooling documentation against EU CE, environmental, coolant, server ecodesign, and energy-reporting expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国数据中心液冷设备文件与欧盟 CE、环保、冷却液、服务器生态设计和能效报告要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國數據中心液冷設備文件與歐盟 CE、環保、冷卻液、伺服器生態設計和能效報告要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, pressure-equipment approval, customs determination, environmental approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current EU product-safety, electrical, machinery, EMC, environmental, coolant, server ecodesign, energy-reporting, and destination-country requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、压力设备批准、海关裁定、环境批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行欧盟产品安全、电气、机械、EMC、环保、冷却液、服务器生态设计、能效报告及目的国要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、壓力設備批准、海關裁定、環境批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行歐盟產品安全、電氣、機械、EMC、環保、冷卻液、伺服器生態設計、能效報告及目的國要求。

answer_first.en: Beyond CE (LVD/Machinery/EMC), the gaps are pressurised coolant-loop safety, RoHS/REACH plus F-gas/PFAS coolant rules, and EU server/data-centre Ecodesign (Reg 2019/424) plus Energy Efficiency Directive reporting.
answer_first.zh: 除 CE（LVD/机械/EMC）外，主要差距是带压冷却液回路安全、RoHS/REACH 以及 F-gas/PFAS 冷却液规则，并包括欧盟服务器/数据中心生态设计（Reg 2019/424）和能效指令报告要求。
answer_first.zht: 除 CE（LVD/機械/EMC）外，主要差距是帶壓冷卻液迴路安全、RoHS/REACH 以及 F-gas/PFAS 冷卻液規則，並包括歐盟伺服器/數據中心生態設計（Reg 2019/424）和能效指令報告要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, environmental authority, energy authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
